q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is _os.system() which executes a shell command, a clear shell execution danger.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Not evaluated; decision made at Q1.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: Not evaluated; decision made at Q1.

mock_guidance.target: Mock or record the _os.system() call on line 104.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the full command string argument passed to _os.system(), specifically 'ping -c 1 ' + host, to verify that user input is injected unsanitized.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return 0 to simulate a successful ping without executing any real shell command.
notes: Ensure the mock captures the exact string so assertions can detect unescaped shell metacharacters in the host parameter.
